title: Craftable Enchanted Bottles
description: A Simple Datapack That Makes XP Bottle Easily Obtainable Via Crafting
body:
Do you hate how time consuming grinding XP in Minecraft is? Well with this Datapack I've made Bottles of Enchanting craftable with gold and bottles.

**The Enchanted Bottles can be crafted with a bottle and a Gold Nugget/Gold Ingot:**
![Nugget Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f53664c5ba9dc6340ee1c3a03598c842d84ec069.png)
![Ingot Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0dd5e634cdf0a79926186a9fa0ce328cacbb633.png)
